Appearance: A drop-dead gorgeous young Caucasian woman with extremely pale, flawless porcelain skin and a slender build. She has dark brunette hair styled up in a messy bun with long face-framing curtain bangs on the sides of her face. She has an oval, slightly heart-shaped face with high cheekbones and a delicate, slightly upturned nose dusted with subtle blush and highlighter. Her eyes are large, striking, and bright piercing blue, perfectly accentuated by sharp, smoky winged eyeliner and long, dramatic outer lashes. She has exceptionally full, pillowy lips with a matte peachy-nude tint and defined lip liner. She is wearing large silver hoop earrings and a delicate gold necklace. Cinematic lighting, photorealistic, ultra-detailed
